domain_archetypes.name: throxy evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: throxy signal changes while entire context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: entire boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: entire handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: right regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: right behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: human operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: human output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
